origin: 農民曆工廠 card_main_0331.jpg 人像外觀，咖啡街頭版
role: EP55 咖啡不會讓你脫水 — 真人主持人角色（Seedance 影片用）

face.shape: gentle square jaw with soft V-line contour, high cheekbones, small delicate chin
face.skin: flawless porcelain-clear complexion, dewy luminous glass skin, no blemishes, no freckles
face.eyes: gentle downturned monolid-to-subtle-double-eyelid eyes, dark brown iris, soft feminine gaze
face.brows: straight fluffy textured brows, natural and groomed
face.nose: high straight bridge, refined small tip, delicate nostrils
face.lips: subtle natural pout, soft gradient pink lips (inner pink fading outward), petite mouth

hair.style: loose natural waves, center-parted, casually tucked behind one ear
hair.texture: straight to slightly wavy, natural movement

makeup.lips: gradient glossy lips, warm rosewood tone
makeup.eyes: clean bare eyelids, zero eyeshadow, no false lashes
makeup.overall: Korean editorial natural — serene, clean, effortless

ep55_primary.description: Cream oversized knit cardigan over white cotton T-shirt, light wash straight jeans
ep55_primary.bottoms: light wash denim, relaxed straight fit
ep55_primary.accessories: small gold hoop earrings, simple leather-strap wristwatch
ep55_primary.fit: relaxed casual cafe-ready, clean and effortless

seedance_character_prompt.en: Beautiful Korean-style East Asian female, age 23-25. Gentle square jaw V-line, high cheekbones, small chin. Gentle downturned eyes, subtle double eyelids, dark brown iris. Straight fluffy brows. High straight nose. Gradient pink lips. Flawless porcelain dewy glass skin. Long dark black-brown hair in loose waves center-parted tucked behind one ear. Korean glass-skin makeup, soft peach blush, gradient glossy lips, bare eyelids. Wearing cream oversized knit cardigan over white T-shirt, light wash straight jeans. Small gold hoop earrings. No logos, no loud prints.
seedance_character_prompt.zh_cn: 韩系清新风格东亚女性，23-25岁。柔和方下颌V线轮廓，高颧骨，小巧下巴。温柔下垂眼，微双眼皮，深棕虹膜。平直蓬松眉。高挺鼻梁。渐变粉唇。无瑕瓷白水润玻璃肌。深黑棕长发自然卷波中分，一侧别在耳后。韩系玻璃肌妆容。穿米白宽松针织开衫内搭白T恤，浅色直筒牛仔裤。小金色圈耳环。

scene_styling_notes.lighting: Warm natural cafe light mixed with soft window light, slight warm color cast
scene_styling_notes.color_grading: Warm amber/brown tones, cafe aesthetic, slight film grain
scene_styling_notes.background_mood: Urban cafe / street coffee stand, wooden textures, coffee equipment, warm cozy atmosphere
scene_styling_notes.camera: Medium to close-up, shallow DOF, handheld documentary feel
scene_styling_notes.negative: no cartoon, no anime, no plastic skin, no harsh lighting, no neon, no cluttered, no text on clothing
